info.name: Settla API
info.description: Settla B2B stablecoin settlement infrastructure API. Covers auth, tenant portal, quotes, transfers, treasury, crypto deposits, bank deposits, payment links, analytics, ops, and health endpoints.

item.name: Demo Flow
item.description: Ordered sequence of requests for a live demo walkthrough. Run these in order to see the full Settla workflow.

request.description: Step 1: Register a new tenant.
Step 2: Login to get JWT tokens.
Step 3: Submit KYB verification.
Step 4: Ops approves the KYB submission.
Step 5: Create an API key for programmatic access.
Step 6: Configure webhook delivery.
Step 7: Get an FX quote for GBP to NGN.
Step 8: Create a cross-border transfer using the quote.
Step 9: Poll the transfer status.
Step 10: View the event trail for the transfer.
Step 11: Check treasury positions after the transfer.
Step 12: Create a crypto deposit session.
Step 13: Check crypto balances.
Step 14: Create a payment link for merchant collections.
Step 15: Resolve the payment link as a payer would.
Step 16: View transfer analytics to wrap up the demo.
Basic health check. Returns 200 if the gateway is running.

exec: pm.test('Response time is less than 2000ms', function () {

request.description: Readiness probe. Checks gRPC backend and Redis connectivity.

exec: pm.test('Response time is less than 5000ms', function () {
